basic_details.job_title: CDPO Sangli Anganwadi Helpers Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Child Development Project Office Sangli (CDPO Sangli)
basic_details.short_information: Child Development Project Office Sangli (CDPO Sangli) Anganwadi Helper Notification 2026 has been released on the official website sangli.nic.in. A total of 6 Anganwadi Helper vacancies have been announced through the CDPO Sangli Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: Widows up to 40 years

selection_process: Merit List based on qualification Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CDPO Sangli Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CDPO Sangli Anganwadi Helper Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download CDPO Sangli Anganwadi Helper Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CDPO Sangli Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 - Overview
CDPO Sangli Anganwadi Helper Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CDPO Sangli Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CDPO Sangli Anganwadi Helper Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CDPO Sangli Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CDPO Sangli Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anganwadi Helper post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Anganwadi Helper post is 24th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the office by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Anganwadi Helper position?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years for the Anganwadi Helper post. Age relaxation is provided for certain categories.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 12th grade (HSC or equivalent) from a recognized board to be eligible for the Anganwadi Helper position.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Anganwadi Helper post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies announced for the Anganwadi Helper position by the Child Development Project Office Sangli.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Anganwadi Helper role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 7500 per month, along with an incentive of Rs. 800-1000.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for the Anganwadi Helper recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Anganwadi Helper posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a merit list prepared according to the candidate's qualifications, followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations available for specific categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is available for widows, who can apply up to the age of 40 years.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, which provides direct links to the relevant documents.
